title: Manufacturing Engineer - Colgate-Palmolive India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Colgate-Palmolive India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Colgate-Palmolive India has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Colgate-Palmolive India:
Colgate-Palmolive India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colgate-Palmolive India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
